Frequently Asked Questions
What's Included in Each Cleaning? ▼
Standard Cleaning
Best for: Weekly or bi-weekly maintenance.

✓ Floors: Vacuuming all floors and carpets + mopping hard floors
✓ Bathrooms: Full cleaning and sanitization of the toilet, sink, shower, and tub
✓ Kitchen: Cleaning countertops, sinks, and the stovetop surface
✓ Dusting: Wiping down all accessible surfaces, furniture, and shelves
✓ Microwave: Wiping the exterior
✓ Mirrors: Cleaning and polishing all mirrors
✓ Trash: Emptying trash bins and replacing bags

Deep Cleaning
Best for: First-time visits or homes not cleaned in 4+ weeks.
Includes everything in Standard, PLUS:

✓ Bathroom Deep Care: Removing soap scum and hard water stains from showers and tubs
✓ Kitchen Degreasing: Heavy-duty cleaning of the stovetop and burners
✓ Cabinets: Wiping down the exterior of all kitchen cabinets (removing grease and fingerprints)
✓ Microwave: Deep cleaning the interior
✓ Baseboards: Detailed wiping of all baseboards throughout the home
✓ Hard-to-reach areas: Vacuuming and mopping under accessible furniture

Move-In / Move-Out Cleaning
Best for: Empty homes.
Includes everything in Deep Cleaning, PLUS:

✓ Cabinets & Drawers: Detailed cleaning inside all kitchen and bathroom cabinets and drawers
✓ Wall Spot Cleaning: Removing a few visible marks or fingerprints on walls
✓ Note: Full wall washing or excessive stains are subject to an extra charge
✓ Full Reset: A top-to-bottom clean of the entire empty property
Do you bring your own supplies? ▼
Yes! We bring all professional-grade cleaning products, microfiber cloths, mops, vacuums, and extendable dusters. You don't need to prepare anything.
How fast do you respond? ▼
We respond to every inquiry within 10 minutes during business hours. After you fill out the booking form, we'll contact you to confirm all details.
What payment methods do you accept? ▼
We accept Credit Card, Cash, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Zelle, and Samsung Pay.
Do you clean homes with pets? ▼
Absolutely! We love pets. We use pet-safe products and give extra attention to pet hair and high-traffic areas. Just add the pet home option (+$15) when booking.
How does the recurring discount work? ▼
If you book recurring standard cleanings, you get: Weekly → 15% off, Bi-weekly → 10% off, Monthly → 5% off. The discount applies to every visit automatically.
